column1: # Source: VDA ISA 6.0.4 catalogue cross-references to ISO 27001:2022 (April 2024 release).
# IDs follow the TISAX loader domain-prefix convention (ACC/BCM/CMP/COM/CRY/DEV/HRS/INC/INF/OPS/PHY/SUP).

column9: Information security policy — direct equivalent to A.5.1.
Review of the information security policy — A.5.1 mandates planned-interval review.
Management responsibility for information security — A.5.2 roles and responsibilities.
Inventory of assets — A.5.9 inventory of information and associated assets.
Ownership of assets — owner documented per A.5.9.
Acceptable use of assets — direct A.5.10.
Terms and conditions of employment — A.6.2.
Information security awareness, education and training — A.6.3.
Information transfer policies and procedures — A.5.14.
Reporting of information security events — A.6.8.
Assessment and decision on events — A.5.25.
Prototype Protection Proto Parts — maps to classification A.5.12 plus physical controls; AL3 extension of ISO scope.
Prototype vehicles — physical perimeter + camouflage; AL3-specific.
Test vehicles on public roads — A.7.9 assets off-premises; AL3-specific.
Events and media shootings — information transfer controls (A.5.14) plus NDA; AL3.
